extraction.one_line_summary: ALA PHILIPPE Julian won a technical bunch sprint at 3km after Ballerini's breakaway collapsed, despite being positioned as leadout for Viviani.
tactical_patterns: Deceuninck-Quick Step prioritized GC bonus seconds over pure sprint victory, letting Ala Philippe freelance from leadout duties.
Ballerini breakaway survived until 3km despite peloton closing to 37 seconds earlier, suggesting tactical hesitation among sprint teams.
Sprint trains completely disintegrated on tired legs after long stages, allowing non-sprinter to win via positioning alone.

rider_signals.ALA PHILIPPE Julian: positive: converted leadout role to stage win opportunistically, gains 10 bonus seconds for GC despite not being designated sprinter
rider_signals.VIVIANI Elia: negative: caught Bonnamour's wheel instead of Quick Step leadout train, showing fatigue-induced positional errors
rider_signals.BALLERINI Davide: neutral: Astana rider's breakaway timing miscalculated by surviving to 3km when peloton already at 37 seconds earlier
